title: Bootstrap Basics Quiz
description: Evaluate your understanding of the Bootstrap CSS Framework role, the grid system, mobile-first design, and getting started with CDN/NPM.

questions.question: Which and/or what is Bootstrap's primary role in a web application?
options: A comprehensive collection of pre-designed CSS and optionally JS components (buttons, forms, layout) for building professional UIs fast.
To hide the JavaScript code from the console.
To replace the standard HTML input elements.

questions.question: Which and/or what is the key component of Bootstrap's layout system?
The design pattern where styles are written for small screens first and then adjusted as the screen grows is called ________.
Which popular company originally created and maintained Bootstrap?
Does Bootstrap provide a robust and consistent design system that speeds up web development?
options: Yes, as it handles the common design and layout problems for you out of the box.
